overview.value: Monstera is a tropical climbing houseplant known for its split leaves. It grows best with steady warmth, bright filtered light, and a chunky, well-draining potting mix.

localizedContentsJSON.value: {"en":{"commonName":"Monstera","overview":"Monstera is a tropical climbing houseplant known for its split leaves. It grows best with steady warmth, bright filtered light, and a chunky, well-draining potting mix.","tips":"Give it a moss pole or support if you want larger, more mature leaves."},"zh-Hans":{"commonName":"龟背竹","overview":"龟背竹是一种热带攀援型室内观叶植物，以带有裂口和孔洞的大叶片闻名。它喜欢稳定温暖的环境、明亮散射光和疏松排水好的介质。","tips":"如果想让叶片更大更成熟，可以给它加苔藓杆或支撑架。"}}
